query: SELECT id, nombre, imagenPortadaUrl, CASE WHEN imagenPortadaBase64 IS NOT NULL THEN 'SI' ELSE 'NO' END as tiene_base64 FROM proyectos; SELECT id, name, foto, CASE WHEN fotoBase64 IS NOT NULL THEN 'SI' ELSE 'NO' END as tiene_base64 FROM users LIMIT 10;
